evidence.claim: Each question can be tagged with one or more competencies.
evidence.fact: Each question can be tagged with one or more competencies.
evidence.user_story_span: each tagged with one or more competencies
evidence.fact_span: Each question can be tagged with one or more competencies.

evidence.claim: Each question can be tagged with one difficulty tier (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced).
evidence.fact: Each question in the exam can be associated with multiple competencies and assigned a difficulty level of Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.
evidence.fact_span: assigned a difficulty level of Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced

evidence.claim: Each question can have an associated nugget reward multiplier.
evidence.fact: The difficulty tier determines a nugget reward multiplier for the question.
evidence.user_story_span: Each question can have an associated nugget reward multiplier.
evidence.fact_span: The difficulty tier determines a nugget reward multiplier for the question.

evidence.claim: The system has a user role of exam creator.
evidence.fact: Using the exam builder, instructors compose assessments from multiple-choice questions, drag-and-drop items, and code snippet exercises.

evidence.claim: Difficulty tiers are Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced.
evidence.fact: Each question in the exam can be associated with multiple competencies and assigned a difficulty level of Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.
